case_title: CALVIN WARD VS. AMD PROJECT LLC

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MICHELLE VILARDI, EVENTS MANAGER FOR MISSION TEAM PLAYER, LLC FILED BY DEFENDANT MISSION TEAM PLAYERS LLC

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WARD, CALVIN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-15-2022 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,628.49 FILED BY WARD, CALVIN AS TO DEFENDANT MISSION TEAM PLAYERS LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-15-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY WARD, CALVIN MISSION TEAM PLAYERS LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-15-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-15-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ERIC GROVER. PLAINTIFF CALVIN WARD IS PRESENT WITH WITNESSES JAMES LAUFENBERG AND MICHAEL DALY. DEFENDANT AMD PROJECT LLC IS PRESENT (TRUE NAME IS MISSION TEAM PLAYERS, LLC)REPRESENTED BY MICHELLE VILARDI, EVENTS MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WARD, CALVIN AS TO DEFENDANT MISSION TEAM PLAYERS LLC
REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD 11/18/22. SC-100 MAILED CERTIFIED TO GINA WAOTN-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WARD, CALVIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MISSION TEAM PLAYERS LLC NOTHING. PLAINTIFF DID NOT ESTABLISH THAT DEFENDANT WAS REQUIRED TO PROVIDE MORE THAN ONE BARTENDER. PLAINTIFF WAS ONLY CHARGED AN AMOUNT THAT WAS AGREED TO IN THE CONTRACT. CORRECT NAME OF DEFENDANT IS MISSION TEAM PLAYERS, LLC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $0 SERVED NOV-18-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MISSION TEAM PLAYERS LLC
